Appearances:
Plaintiff, Young Sohn is present.
Attorney, Frank Potasz, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Steven Mitchelle and Laura Mitchell, are present.
Attorney, Ming Chung , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of AUG-23-2010 remains on calendar.
